plan.title: Mission Control: conversation launcher with t3code-informed UX

items.title: Add conversations table to SQLite schema

narrative.Action: Add a `conversations` table to src/lib/database/schema.ts with columns: id, name (UNIQUE), tmux_session, status (active/ended), cwd, issue_id (nullable), created_at, ended_at, last_attached_at. Use CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS for migration safety.

subItems.title: Table created with all columns: id, name, tmux_session, status, cwd, issue_id, created_at, ended_at, last_attached_at
name column has UNIQUE constraint
Uses CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pattern consistent with other tables

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/server/routes/conversations.ts with four endpoints: GET /api/conversations (list all sessions from SQLite), POST /api/conversations (spawn new tmux session via createSession + insert SQLite row), DELETE /api/conversations/:name (kill tmux session + mark ended), POST /api/conversations/:name/resume (check tmux existence — reattach if alive, respawn if dead). Wire routes into src/dashboard/server/server.ts. All operations MUST be async (no execSync). Session naming: conv-{name}. Spawn command: 'claude' in ~/Projects cwd.

subItems.title: GET /api/conversations returns list with name, status, created_at, last_attached_at
POST /api/conversations spawns tmux session conv-{name} with 'claude' command in ~/Projects
DELETE /api/conversations/:name kills tmux session and sets status to 'ended' with ended_at timestamp
POST /api/conversations/:name/resume reattaches if tmux session alive, respawns if dead
No execSync or other blocking calls — all async
Routes wired into server.ts route composition

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/MissionControl/ConversationList.tsx — a collapsible section rendered at the top of the Mission Control sidebar (above ProjectTree). Shows active sessions with green dot, ended sessions with gray dot. Includes [+] button that reveals an inline text input for naming new sessions. Enter spawns (POST /api/conversations), Escape cancels. Auto-generates name if blank (conv-YYYYMMDD-N). Clicking a session calls onSelect(name). Uses TanStack Query to poll GET /api/conversations every 5s.

subItems.title: Collapsible section with header 'Conversations' and [+] button
Active sessions show green dot, ended sessions show gray dot
Inline name input appears on [+] click, Enter spawns, Escape cancels
Auto-generates name if input left blank
Polls /api/conversations via TanStack Query (5s refetch interval)

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/MissionControl/ConversationTerminal.tsx — wraps the existing XTerminal component for conversation context. When conversation is active, renders XTerminal with session='conv-{name}'. When conversation is ended, shows 'Session ended' message with a 'Resume' button that calls POST /api/conversations/:name/resume and then reattaches the terminal. Include a small toolbar with session name display and a Stop button (DELETE /api/conversations/:name).

subItems.title: Renders XTerminal with correct session name (conv-{name}) for active sessions
Shows 'Session ended' state with Resume button for ended sessions
Resume button calls /api/conversations/:name/resume and reattaches terminal
Toolbar shows session name and Stop button

items.title: Integrate conversation components into Mission Control layout

narrative.Action: Modify src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/MissionControl/index.tsx to: (1) Add selectedConversation state (string | null). (2) Render ConversationList as first child in sidebar, above ProjectTree. (3) When selectedConversation is set, render ConversationTerminal in the right panel instead of the feature detail view. (4) When selectedConversation is null, render existing content as normal. (5) Clicking a project feature clears selectedConversation. (6) Clicking a conversation clears selectedFeature.

subItems.title: ConversationList renders above ProjectTree in sidebar
Selecting a conversation switches right panel to ConversationTerminal
Selecting a project feature clears conversation selection and shows feature detail
Empty state shows when nothing is selected

items.title: Add session lifecycle polling to detect ended sessions

narrative.Action: Add a periodic check (every 10s) in the conversations API route or as a lightweight service function that runs tmux list-sessions (async), compares against SQLite active conversations, and marks any missing tmux sessions as 'ended' with current timestamp. This ensures the UI shows correct status when a user types 'exit' in Claude or the session otherwise terminates outside the dashboard.

subItems.title: Polls tmux list-sessions every 10s (async, non-blocking)
Marks conversations as 'ended' when their tmux session disappears
Only checks conv-* sessions — does not interfere with agent/planning sessions

items.title: Verify typecheck, lint, and tests pass

narrative.Action: Run npm run typecheck, npm run lint, and npm test. Fix any issues. Ensure no regressions in existing Mission Control functionality.

subItems.title: npm run typecheck passes
npm run lint passes
npm test passes with no regressions
